summary: Phase 2 Liquid Steel theme testing complete. Login and Register pages fully transformed to dark theme (#0F1720). All 17 test cases PASSED including ACTUAL LOGIN with real credentials.

login_page_theme.orange_accent: PASS - #FF6A00 (rgb(255, 106, 0)) on Sign in button and links
login_page_theme.jetbrains_mono: PASS - Applied to metrics and labels
login_page_theme.no_white_backgrounds: PASS - Page renders with dark theme

login_page_elements.password_input: PASS - Accepts input, masked by default

register_page_elements.password_mismatch_error: PASS - Shows error when passwords don't match

actual_login_test.dashboard_content: PASS - Dashboard loaded with tutorial modal

critical_code_review_comments: Liquid Steel theme correctly applied: dark background #0F1720, orange accent #FF6A00
All three fonts used correctly: Cormorant Garamond (headings), Inter (body), JetBrains Mono (metrics/labels)
Auth logic preserved - signIn, signUp, signInWithOAuth all functional
Trust panel visible on desktop viewport (1920px width) on both pages
Password mismatch validation working correctly on register page
Form validation prevents submission until form is valid
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Liquid Steel theme complete. Login (/login-supabase) and Register (/register-supabase) pages now use dark theme with #0F1720 background, #FF6A00 orange accent, Cormorant Garamond headings, Inter body text, JetBrains Mono metrics. Real login tested with andre@thestrategysquad.com.au credentials - redirects to /advisor successfully. All OAuth buttons (Google, Microsoft) are present and clickable. Register form validation working (password mismatch error, disabled submit until valid).

mocked_apis.note: Real Supabase Auth - no mocked APIs
